title: Crispy Sour Trout Pancakes
description: A Mediterranean-inspired meal-prep dish featuring sour trout mixed with herbs and spices to create crispy pancakes that can be enjoyed as a quick breakfast or snack.
instructions: Combine all ingredients except the trout in a large bowl.
Knead the mixture until it becomes a thick batter, adding more flour if needed to achieve desired consistency.
Gently fold fillets into the mixture for even distribution of flavors and spices.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat. When hot, pour 1/4 cup of the mixture per pancake onto the skillet.
Cook until golden brown on both sides, about 2-3 minutes per side, flipping carefully with a spatula to prevent breaking the fillets.
Serve immediately and store any leftovers in an airtight container for up to 2 days.
